description: Recurring overnight failures of the tariff-classification data feed point to an unstable connector to the HTS reference service. Tracking root cause and a durable fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Tariff-classification data feed failed overnight sync

description: USMCA certificate uploads fail validation across multiple users, indicating a defect in the validation module rather than user error. Root-cause analysis underway.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — USMCA certificate upload error in compliance portal

description: Intermittent SSO login loops on the customs broker portal recur after each identity-provider sync. Investigating the session-handling configuration.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Customs broker portal SSO intermittent outage

description: Duty-drawback report consistently times out on large entry sets, pointing to an unoptimized query. Tracking remediation.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Duty-drawback report times out on large entry set

description: ACE entry-summary integration rejects line items after field-mapping updates. Recurring schema validation failures indicate a mapping drift problem.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — ACE entry-summary integration rejecting line items

description: VPN tunnel to the trade-compliance shared drive drops repeatedly under load. Investigating gateway configuration as the underlying cause.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — VPN tunnel to trade-compliance shared drive dropping

description: Trade-compliance dashboard current-period widgets fail to load on a recurring basis at month boundaries. Investigating the period query.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Trade-compliance dashboard not loading entry data

description: HTS reference table updates repeatedly invalidate saved classifications. Tracking a process fix so updates don't break stored codes.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — HTS reference table update broke saved classifications

description: ACE ABI transmissions are rejected on the importer-of-record mapping across several entries. Root cause appears to be a stale mapping definition.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — ACE ABI transmission rejected with mapping error

description: Recurring access-provisioning delays for the AD/CVD case tracker suggest a gap in the role template. Tracking a standing fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — New analyst access request for AD/CVD case tracker

description: Receiving-dock scans repeatedly fail to reach the import inventory system, pointing to a fault in the scanner middleware rather than the hardware. Tracking a durable fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Receiving-dock scanner not feeding import inventory system

description: AES export filings time out at the gateway on a recurring basis when EEI volume is high. Investigating the connection handling to the filing service.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — AES export filing submission returning gateway error

description: Entry-status email notifications stop sending intermittently while the events still log, indicating a defect in the notification service. Tracking remediation.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Email notifications for entry status not sending

description: The OCR step misreads invoice values on a recurring basis, putting wrong amounts into entry drafts. Investigating the OCR template as the underlying cause.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Document scanner OCR misreading invoice values

description: The shared broker-correspondence mailbox stops syncing on multiple workstations after updates, pointing to a cache-mode configuration problem. Tracking a standing fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Shared mailbox for broker correspondence not syncing

description: The reconciliation module emits duplicate line items for value-flagged entries on a recurring basis, throwing off totals. Investigating the de-duplication logic.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Reconciliation module returning duplicate line items

description: The customs-desk printer repeatedly fails to pull entry packets from the portal print queue while other jobs print. Investigating the print-queue routing.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Printer at customs desk not pulling entry packets

description: Two-factor codes for the broker portal fail to arrive by text for several users on a recurring basis while email codes work. Investigating the SMS delivery path.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Two-factor authentication codes not arriving

description: The bonded-inventory report exports as a corrupt file on a recurring basis, blocking CBP requests. Investigating the export routine as the root cause.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Bonded inventory report export is corrupt

description: Queries against the historical entry archive have degraded sharply, pointing to missing indexes rather than data volume. Tracking an indexing and caching fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis — Slow performance loading historical entry archive
